title: MopCards
body:
This mod is designed for use on multiplayer servers.

MopCards is a element-based Trading Card Game, similar to Card-Jitsu from Club Penguin. The cards are somewhat difficult to collect, with roughly 93 total Cards, and even 3 different rarity levels.

Currently, you can obtain Cards and Boosters from rare foes called Card Ghosts, but I'm currently trying to make a special villager that will trade them instead.

The mod also includes rules as an item in-game - in fact, all the needed items are part of the mod! The only thing you might need is a table to play it on, but I'm sure other mods can provide them.
